transcript:
Speaker A: Where are you from?
Speaker B: I'm from Kolkata, India.
Speaker A: Wow, your English sounds great.
Speaker B: A few months ago, I couldn't say a single word.
Speaker A: Seriously? How did you learn so fast?
Speaker B: Uh, I have an AI tutor that helps me.
Speaker A: Show me.
Speaker B: হে সুমন, আজ কেমন আছো? [Hey Suman, how are you today?]
Speaker C (AI): Great. I was being interviewed right now.
Speaker B: I was... না, I am being interviewed right now বলা উচিত। [I was... no, I should say 'I am being interviewed right now'.]
Speaker B: Oh, I am being interviewed right now.
Speaker C (AI): একদম ঠিক। ইন্টারভিউ কি সম্পর্কে? [Exactly right. What is the interview about?]
Speaker B: It's about my English skills. They say me, I speak with confidence.
Speaker C (AI): They say me না, They say I speak with confidence হবে। [Not 'They say me', it should be 'They say I speak with confidence'.]
Speaker B: You're right. They say I speak with confidence.
Speaker C (AI): আমার সঙ্গে আমরা প্রতিদিন ইংলিশ ইম্প্রুভ করতে পারি। রোজ ১০ মিনিট আমার সঙ্গে ইংলিশ প্র্যাকটিস করো, আর তুমি এক মাসের মধ্যে ভালো ইংলিশ বলতে শুরু করবে। ৫০ লক্ষের বেশি ইউজার্স MySivi তে প্র্যাকটিস করো। তুমিও শুরু করো। মাত্র ১ টাকায় শুরু করো। [With me, we can improve English every day. Practice English with me for 10 minutes daily, and you will start speaking good English within a month. More than 50 lakh users practice on MySivi. You start too. Start for just 1 Rupee.]
on_screen_text: FROM KOLKATA INDIA SOUNDS GREAT A FEW MONTHS AGO SINGLE WORD SERIOUSLY SO FAST AI TUTOR SHOW ME AAJ KEMON ACHO GREAT I WAS BEING INTERVIEWED RIGHT NOW I WAS NA I AM BEING INTERVIEWED RIGHT NOW BOLA UCHIT OH I AM BEING INTERVIEWED RIGHT NOW EKDOM THIK INTERVIEW KI SOMPORKO IT'S ABOUT MY ENGLISH SKILLS THEY SAY ME I SPEAK WITH CONFIDENCE THEY SAY ME NA THEY SAY I SPEAK WITH CONFIDENCE HOBE YOU'RE RIGHT THEY SAY I SPEAK WITH CONFIDENCE AMAR SANGE PROTIDIN ENGLISH IMPROVE KORTE PARI ROZ 10 Minutes AMAR SANGE ENGLISH PRACTICE KORO EK MASER MODHYE BHALO ENGLISH BOLTE SHURU KORBE 50 Lakhs USERS MYSIVI TE PRACTICE KORO TUMIO SHURU KORO 1 Rupee Only MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A street interviewer asks a man from Kolkata how his English became so fluent, prompting him to demonstrate his AI tutor app. The AI avatar converses with him and corrects his grammar in real-time. The ad ends with a call to action to download MySivi for 1 Rupee.
